candidates.row_label: Long Term Debt Maturing within 1 Years
candidates.why: Explicit current portion of long-term debt; clean match for short-term debt/current maturities and excludes leases.

final_choice.row_label: Long Term Debt Maturing within 1 Years

variables.notes: Ambiguity across years: one current liability line 'Interest-bearing liabilities' appears in the current liabilities section and may represent total current borrowings, while 'Long Term Debt Maturing within 1 Years' appears as supplemental detail and may substitute in other years. Kept both as priority alternatives, not intended to be summed together manually without year-specific checking.
